title: Easy Anglerfish Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Anglerfish Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download and print this easy deep sea anglerfish coloring sheet. Great for young ocean fans. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Anglerfish lives at depths of up to 6,000 feet, where the pressure is over 150 times that of the surface.
Deep-sea Anglerfishs have a specialized bioluminescent lure called the esca projecting from their heads to attract prey in total darkness.
